response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across multiple industries, with over 14 years in software development. His expertise aligns strongly with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). His work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability challenges, and diverse tech stacks (including Kubernetes, Docker, and MongoDB) highlights deep engineering skills. While his recent role focuses on AI agents rather than traditional full-stack development, his technical breadth and problem-solving record justify an interview.
strengths: 14+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB (primary stack)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and performance optimization
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework) in job history
No explicit mention of Vitest (primary testing framework) in recent roles
Current role focuses heavily on AI agents rather than traditional full-stack development

key_factors.factor: Alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
